ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborating institutions or researchers */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the experiment belongs */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical test */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the test belongs */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical test (e.g., ANOVA, t-test) */,
  "alpha_level" REAL /* Significance level used in the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the statistical test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test (e.g., parametric, non-parametric) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the test */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_tests_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical test from which the result originates */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability value from the statistical test */,
  "freedom1" REAL /* First degree of freedom for the test */,
  "freedom2" REAL /* Second degree of freedom for the test */,
  "finv" REAL /* Computed F value for the test */,
  "finv1" REAL /* Secondary F value for comparison */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was computed */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value from the statistical test */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the test */,
  "test_statistic" REAL /* Test statistic value (e.g., t-value, F-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES statistical_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, TXT) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file contents */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import record if the file was imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES experiment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the status belongs */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., pending, completed, in review) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_statuses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_statuses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permissions apply */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment for which the permissions are set */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the experiment */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the experiment */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the experiment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's session */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the imported data */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Name of the source system from which the data was imported */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
